documentation.description:
This opaque type is used to return a Reward + Action pair.
It's necessary because the Action is unconstrained.
Raised when the action probabilities don't add to 1.0

subprograms.name: Get_Action
subprograms.code: function Get_Action (This : in Result) return Action.Object'Class

subprograms.name: Get_Reward
subprograms.code: function Get_Reward (This : in Result) return Rewards

subprograms.name: Operator

documentation.description: Applies the Bellman Operator, obtaining the new best Reward for a state.

subprograms.name: Pruned_Operator

documentation.description:
Applies the Bellman Operator, obtaining the new best Reward for a state.
Uses an already pruned list of Outcomes for the State.
